introSection: Montanha Russa is a steel water roller coaster located at Aquashow Family Park in Quarteira, Algarve, Portugal.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The roller coaster track part of Montanha Russa is identical to Poseidon at Europa-Park. The floating sections are somewhat different and shorter.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 4 rows for a total of 8 riders per car.

fullText:
Montanha Russa is a steel water roller coaster located at Aquashow Family Park in Quarteira, Algarve, Portugal.

The roller coaster track part of Montanha Russa is identical to Poseidon at Europa-Park. The floating sections are somewhat different and shorter.

Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 4 rows for a total of 8 riders per car.
